title: 2542 Pcs Gem Stickers, 5 Sheets Self Adhesive Gems, Acrylic Crystal Gems Sheets, Rhinestone Stickers for Craft DIY Nail Facial Nail Makeup Decoration, with Pick Up Tweezer(3/4/5/6mm)

features: 【Rhinestone Sticker Set】:You will get 5 silver rhinestone stickers and 1 tweezers. The adhesive strip connects a whole strip of rhinestones, making it easier and quicker to paste. You can easily tear off a whole strip and paste them where you want to decorate

【Acrylic Material】:Rhinestone stickers are made of high quality acrylic material and can be used in direct contact with the skin. They do not irritate the skin, which can be safely used on the face and nails with good glossy effect

【Various Size】:The diameter of the gemstones is 3/4/5/6mm, and the different sizes allow these stickers to not only be used on crafts, it's also suitable for various parties. You can choose to use different sizes of crystal rhinestones according to your needs

【Easy to Use】: Equipped with 10cm small tweezers, which can be easily torn off. They are self-adhesive, so application is easy, just peel off from the backing paper and stick according to your ideas. Please press for ten seconds when pasting to ensure a stronger fixation, if you want the rhinestones to last longer, you can use eyelash glue to increase its stickiness

【Wide Application】:Glitter Gem stickers are perfect for making all the patterns and styles you want, suitable for DIY work, stage makeup, manicure, phone cases, wedding compositions, dance shoes, home decorations, etc
description: Product Description Sularpek Gem Stickers give off a particularly beautiful and intense glow in different forms under the light, making your decorations more dazzling and In addition to using for makeup and nail art, you can also make various handmade ornaments yourself to create your own ornament style.unique. Product Description: 1.In addition to the rhinestone decorations contained in the product, a small tweezer will also be included as a tool for your convenience. 2.Removable and reusable, when we change the sticker to other positions, it can be repositioned to instantly brighten any place you like. 3.After use, these small decorations can be easily removed, and there is no residue after peeling off, no glue, no harm to skin, nails, gifts, etc. Specifications: Quantity: 2542 pieces. Material: Acrylic. Color: Silver. Size: 6/5/4/3 mm. Shape: Round.
